name: latest-branch-with-top
_doc: Schema for `gitmap latest-branch --format=json` when a top-N list is requested (top>0). Identical to `latest-branch-no-top.vN.json` plus the trailing `top` key. Two separate schemas (rather than one with optional `top`) because a downstream consumer that always expects 7 keys with --top=N is a different contract from one that expects 6 keys without.
